edits.why: 4:10 names Mahlon in-verse ('Ruth the Moabitess, the wife of Mahlon... to raise the name of the dead') — the book has disclosed the referent at this point, so the FOR_MODEL binds: B4-Mahlon. Surface form HA_MET_THE_DEAD preserved. Contrast P11's 4:5 ham-met (pre-disclosure in the gate scene): stays B? per the same rule — the model's own fill already withheld there.
